title: Impaired PIEZO1 function in patients with a novel autosomal recessive congenital lymphatic dysplasia
research_objectives: Characterize PIEZO1 loss-of-function mutations in human patients
Identify novel clinical manifestations of PIEZO1 dysfunction
Understand PIEZO1 role in lymphatic system development

research_scope.focus_area: PIEZO1 mechanotransduction ion channels and lymphatic development
